description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CTest (Windows) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should have read-only repository contents permission and run a matrix job across multiple Windows environments (2019 and 2022), build types (Debug and Release), and architectures (amd64, amd64_x86, amd64_arm64). For each matrix entry, check out the repository, clone a test repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure and build with CMake, run tests for Release builds, clean up, and then configure and build with CMake again for DLL builds.
